B

bfs(Node, Map<Node, Map<Node, Double>>) - Static method in class algorithms.Bfs
Performs BFS from a starting node over an adjacency list and returns distances.
Bfs - Class in algorithms
Utility class for performing Breadth-First Search (BFS) and connectivity checks on graphs.
Bfs() - Constructor for class algorithms.Bfs
 
BLACK - Enum constant in enum class models.Color
 
BLUE - Enum constant in enum class models.Color
 
BookingSystem - Class in utils
BookingSystem is a singleton class that manages student reservations for transportation routes.

buildGraphFromEdges(List<Edge>) - Static method in class utils.EdgeUtils
 

C

calculateDiameter(List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.SD2
Calculates the diameter of the graph (maximum shortest path length).
calculateMSTCost(List<Edge>) - Static method in class algorithms.Kruskal
Calculates the total weight of the edges in the MST.
calculateRadius(List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.SD2
Calculates the radius of the graph (minimum eccentricity among all nodes).
canBeCancelled() - Method in class models.Reservation
 
canBeConfirmed() - Method in class models.Reservation
 
CANCELLED - Enum constant in enum class models.Reservation.ReservationStatus
 
cancelReservation(String) - Method in class utils.BookingSystem
Cancels a reservation by its ID if it is cancellable.
capacityPenalty - Variable in class algorithms.SmartDijkstra.OptimizationWeights
 
Color - Enum Class in models
 
COMPLETED - Enum constant in enum class models.Reservation.ReservationStatus
 
CONFIRMED - Enum constant in enum class models.Reservation.ReservationStatus
 
confirmReservation(String) - Method in class utils.BookingSystem
Confirms a reservation by its ID if it's pending.
costWeight - Variable in class algorithms.SmartDijkstra.OptimizationWeights
 
createEdgeKey(Node, Node) - Static method in class utils.EdgeUtils

Implementation of Dijkstra's algorithm for shortest path calculations in weighted graphs.

equals(Object) - Method in class models.Node
 
equals(Object) - Method in class models.Reservation

F

find(int) - Method in class algorithms.UnionFind
Finds the representative (root) of the set that element x belongs to.
findAllDistances(List<Node>, Node) - Static method in class algorithms.Dijkstra
Computes the shortest distances from a start node to all other nodes using Dijkstra's algorithm.
findAlternativePaths(List<Node>, Node, Node, Student, int) - Static method in class algorithms.SmartDijkstra
Finds alternative optimized paths based on different optimization weights.
findAlternativeRoutes(Edge) - Method in class utils.BookingSystem
Finds alternative available routes from the same source as the given route.
findCenter(List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.SD2
Finds the center of the graph (node with minimum sum of distances to others).
findCheaperRoutes(Edge, double) - Method in class utils.BookingSystem
Finds cheaper available routes within the student's budget from the same source.
findConnectedComponents(List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.Bfs
Finds all connected components in the graph using BFS.
findMST(List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.Kruskal
Finds the Minimum Spanning Tree (MST) of the given graph using Kruskal's algorithm.
findOptimalPath(List<Node>, Node, Node, Student, SmartDijkstra.OptimizationWeights) - Static method in class algorithms.SmartDijkstra
Finds the optimal path using a multi-objective Dijkstra algorithm.
findOptimalPath(List<Node>, Node, Node, Student, SmartDijkstra.OptimizationWeights, List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.SmartDijkstra
Same as findOptimalPath but with animation sequence tracking.
findSD2Edges(List<Edge>, List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.SD2
Finds additional edges to be added to the MST to ensure the resulting graph has a diameter of at most 2.
findShortestPath(List<Node>, Node, Node) - Static method in class algorithms.Dijkstra
Finds the shortest path between a start node and an end node using Dijkstra's algorithm.
findStudentById(String) - Method in class utils.BookingSystem
 
floydWarshall(List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.SD2
Applies the Floyd-Warshall algorithm to compute all-pairs shortest paths.

showCostMatrix(List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.TSP
 
SmartDijkstra - Class in algorithms
Implements a modified Dijkstra algorithm optimized for student pathfinding with constraints such as budget, edge capacity, and multi-objective optimization (cost, time, distance).
SmartDijkstra() - Constructor for class algorithms.SmartDijkstra
 
SmartDijkstra.OptimizationWeights - Class in algorithms
Encapsulates weighting parameters for cost, time, and distance.
SmartDijkstra.PathResult - Class in algorithms
Encapsulates the result of a pathfinding operation.
solveTSPSimple(List<Node>, Node) - Static method in class algorithms.TSP
Solves the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) using the Nearest Neighbor heuristic.
solveTSPWithBitmasking(List<Node>, Node) - Static method in class algorithms.TSP
Solves the Traveling Salesman Problem (TSP) using Dynamic Programming with Bitmasking.

Student(String, String, String) - Constructor for class models.Student
 
Student(String, String, String, Node, Node) - Constructor for class models.Student

Returns the value of the success record component.

U

union(int, int) - Method in class algorithms.UnionFind
Unites the sets containing elements x and y using union by rank.
UnionFind - Class in algorithms
Disjoint Set Union (Union-Find) data structure with path compression and union by rank.
UnionFind(int) - Constructor for class algorithms.UnionFind
Initializes the Union-Find structure for n elements, each in its own set.
